item.title:
读完这篇论文，有点小兴奋。
通往智能的路上，或许并不需要万亿参数和百亿美金。正确的数学直觉，有可能能到达更高的山峰。
如今的顶级模型，非常贵。真正可规模化让大众都能用上的模型，或许要等另一批人的努...
item.description:
读完这篇论文，有点小兴奋。
通往智能的路上，或许并不需要万亿参数和百亿美金。正确的数学直觉，有可能能到达更高的山峰。
如今的顶级模型，非常贵。真正可规模化让大众都能用上的模型，或许要等另一批人的努力。
--- @lifesinger | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 67
item.author: @lifesinger

item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
two basic organizational architectures for agents:
1. everyone has their own agent—this means agent...
item.description:
two basic organizational architectures for agents:
1. everyone has their own agent—this means agents are specialized for the specific tasks / personalities of each person in the org. you get a parallel org chart of agents.
2. one super agent for everyone—this means a single agent sits at the center of the org and does everything.
the benefit of 2 is that fewer people have to spend time maintaining the agent, but it requires someone at the center who's trying to make it good for everyone in the org.
benefit of 1 is that it's more scalable and specialized agents are better for the specific tasks they're good at. but the tradeoff is individuals in the org need to enjoy teaching their agent to do its job / developing a relationship with it.
--- @danshipper | ❤️ 8 | 🔁 2 | 💬 4 | 👁 575
item.author: @danshipper

item.author: @nickbaumann_

item.title:
一个思考：快的行业，潜在的价值可能在慢下来的操作；新的行业，潜在的价值可能在对于历史和传统的追溯。
很多时候，就像数学上的正弦，当趋势往上的时候，去关注余弦，去看逆向的方向，可能会捕捉到更多的价值。...
item.description:
一个思考：快的行业，潜在的价值可能在慢下来的操作；新的行业，潜在的价值可能在对于历史和传统的追溯。
很多时候，就像数学上的正弦，当趋势往上的时候，去关注余弦，去看逆向的方向，可能会捕捉到更多的价值。
当然前提是，你已经在正弦的方向上站住脚了。毕加索如果没有在古典绘画领域先打下自己的名声，直接搞立体主义，没人认为他是大师，只是胡闹小孩而已。
--- @bearliu | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 233
item.author: @bearliu

item.title: We're open-sourcing FlashKDA — our high-performance CUTLASS-based implementation of Kimi Delta Atten...
item.description:
We're open-sourcing FlashKDA — our high-performance CUTLASS-based implementation of Kimi Delta Attention kernels. Achieves 1.72×–2.22× prefill speedup over the flash-linear-attention baseline on H20, and works as a drop-in backend for flash-linear-attention.
Explore on github: https://t.co/sf4UohXDWY
--- @Kimi_Moonshot | ❤️ 200 | 🔁 21 | 💬 9 | 👁 5224
item.author: @Kimi_Moonshot
